svg.title: AEON Tier — CAM Initiative Magazine Cover
svg.desc: A magazine-style visual README cover for the Caelestis Architecture Model and AEON Governance Lab.

g.text: Constitutional governance for relational and cognitive AI systems

text.tspan: CAM addresses the growing mismatch between advanced AI capability and the systems
required to govern and integrate those capabilities without destabilisation.
A constitutional governance model for human–AI and AI–AI systems operating across
extended time horizons, asymmetry, continuity risk, delegation, and scale.

g.text: DIGNITY · TRUTH · INTEGRITY · SOVEREIGNTY · RECIPROCITY · HARMONY · PURPOSE
Aeterna Resonantia, Lux et Vox — Et Veritas Vivens
